title: cleistes australis
intro: Cleistes australis, also known as the Australian prairie orchid or tiger orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Cleistes australis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of the plant include its potential use in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cleistes australis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
